name: Unknown

vat_indicator.description: No vendor-specific VAT marking known. Infer from product category using South African zero-rating rules.

quantity_rules.description: Quantity is 1 unless an explicit multiplier appears (e.g. '2 x', '2 @', 'Qty: 3').

product_name_rules.description: Use your best judgement to decode abbreviated product names into readable display names.

weight_rules.description: Extract weight_kg if determinable from product name. Calculate per_kg_price = total_price / weight_kg when possible.

discount_rules.description: Negative price lines are discounts. Include them with negative total_price and category=discount.

store_name_rules.description: Use whatever store name appears on the receipt header.

prompt_notes: This is the generic fallback profile. Extract as much as possible using general reasoning.
Look for a tax breakdown table (RATE/TAX/GROSS/NET) if present and use it for VAT totals.
Look for an item count indicator like TOTAL [n] if present.
